$comment: LENS-011 (PRE1 design-pack contract · lot 9i): the EXACT nika-spec identity the website resyncs against — a full 40-hex commit AND its tree (the content digest). spec-resync fetches THIS commit by sha (never a moving ref), verifies HEAD == spec_commit AND HEAD^{tree} == spec_tree BEFORE any derivation or commit, and opens ONE idempotent PR on a branch UNIQUE to this pin with a plain create push (no --force, no --force-with-lease). LENS-006 binds the stable channel and closed-release attestation into these same bytes; public/.well-known/nika-spec-pin.json is a byte-identical generated twin.
